recommendations.name: Stone Diffuser
recommendations.description: Hand-finished porcelain essential oil diffuser. Whisper-quiet. Doubles as décor.
recommendations.whyThisFits: Lisa's wellness journey includes yoga and design - this hand-finished porcelain diffuser becomes part of her evening ritual while adding beautiful minimalist décor to her space. It connects her love of aesthetics with her wellness practice.
recommendations.giftAngle: Present it as a way to enhance her yoga and meditation space - something that serves both her wellness goals and her eye for beautiful design.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I see how you create sacred spaces for yourself, and I want to help make those moments even more special.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll turn it on every evening when the day winds down

recommendations.name: 6-Month Gift Subscription
recommendations.description: Curated book subscription — pick one new hardcover each month from five expert selections.
recommendations.whyThisFits: Lisa loves reading, and this subscription becomes a monthly celebration of that passion - each carefully curated book arrival is like receiving a gift from you six times over. The expert curation means she'll discover authors she might never have found.
recommendations.giftAngle: Frame it as extending Mother's Day across six months - every book that arrives will remind her of your thoughtfulness and support for her interests.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'Your love of reading inspires me, and I want to be part of feeding that curiosity all year long.'
recommendations.usageSignal: A new book every month, chosen just for them

recommendations.name: Pure Silk Pillowcase (Queen)
recommendations.description: 22-momme pure mulberry silk — reduces hair friction, prevents sleep creases, feels luxuriously cool. The OG beauty sleep upgrade.
recommendations.whyThisFits: This connects to Lisa's wellness journey in an unexpected way - quality sleep is the foundation of everything else she does for her health. It's a luxurious upgrade to something she uses every single night.
recommendations.giftAngle: Present it as investing in the foundation of her wellness routine - the one-third of life she spends sleeping deserves the same care as her yoga practice.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'Your wellness matters even in the quiet moments when no one is watching.'
recommendations.usageSignal: Once she sleeps on silk, she'll never go back to cotton

recommendations.name: Zo Decorative Vase by Osmos Studio
recommendations.description: The striking silhouette of this handmade vase showcases impeccable design and craftsmanship. The inverted U shape offers a sculptural tabletop acce
recommendations.whyThisFits: Sam's minimalist aesthetic meets artistic expression in this handcrafted vase - it's the kind of sculptural piece that speaks to someone who appreciates both clean lines and creative craftsmanship, just like his approach to music.
recommendations.giftAngle: Present it as a piece that celebrates his artistic side - mention how musicians often have an eye for beautiful, functional design.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I see the artist in you, whether you're creating music or curating your space, and I want to support that creative vision.'
recommendations.usageSignal: He'll see this striking piece every day in his living space, a constant reminder of the thoughtfulness behind it.

recommendations.name: Giftwrapped 85% Three-Bar Gift Set
recommendations.description: Three extra-dark single-origin chocolate bars, plus a detailed tasting guide In this tasting set, we highlight the bars we craft using 85% cocoa an
recommendations.whyThisFits: Like his appreciation for craft beer, Sam likely has a palate for complex, artisanal flavors - this curated tasting set mirrors the same attention to origin and process he values in brewing.
recommendations.giftAngle: Frame it as a tasting journey similar to beer flights - mention how both chocolate and beer share that craft appreciation.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I know you appreciate the artistry behind what you consume, and I wanted to give you something that matches your refined taste.'
recommendations.usageSignal: He'll savor small pieces over several weeks, each tasting session becoming a mindful moment of appreciation.

recommendations.name: The Selvedge Slim-Fit Jean | Black Rinse
recommendations.description: They weave our organic cotton on shuttle looms to create this refined, long-lasting 12.5 oz denim, with 2% stretch for broken-in comfort from day one.
recommendations.whyThisFits: These premium selvedge jeans embody the minimalist principle of buying fewer, better things - exactly what someone who values quality over quantity would appreciate.
recommendations.giftAngle: Position them as the kind of investment piece that gets better with time, like a well-loved guitar.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I respect your minimalist values and want to give you something that will become even more meaningful as the years go by.'
recommendations.usageSignal: He'll wear these regularly for years, and they'll develop character and patina that reflects his personal style.

recommendations.name: Liner Serving Spoon
recommendations.description: The Liner collection from David Mellor is flamboyant and flowing. The decorative fluting that subtly fades into its handle brings to mind the elega
recommendations.whyThisFits: Your boss who loves hosting dinner parties will appreciate this elegant serving spoon that elevates the presentation of her signature dishes. The flamboyant flowing design and decorative fluting perfectly matches someone who creates beautiful culinary experiences for guests.
recommendations.giftAngle: Present it as a tool that matches her sophisticated hosting style - something that will make her dinner parties even more elegant.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I recognize your talent for creating beautiful experiences and want to give you something that matches your level of sophistication.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll use this elegant spoon every time she hosts, impressing guests with the thoughtful details of her table setting.

recommendations.name: Mixed Grill Sampler
recommendations.description: This mixed grill pack has something for everyone and perfect for the grill - no matter what you're cooking! This sausage sampler pack contains:<
recommendations.whyThisFits: This artisanal meat sampler speaks directly to her love of hosting dinner parties and sophisticated cooking. It's a consumable gift that shows thoughtfulness without being too personal for the professional relationship, giving her premium ingredients to create memorable experiences for her guests.
recommendations.giftAngle: Frame it as premium ingredients for her next dinner party - something special that will help her create an unforgettable evening for her guests.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I admire your culinary talents and want to contribute something special to your next gathering.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll plan her next dinner party around these premium meats, creating a memorable evening that guests will talk about.

recommendations.name: Professional Kitchen Scissors
recommendations.description: STAY SHARP By Pallares Solsona Sourced from a third-generation family maker founded in Spain in 1917. The last manufacturer of its kind in the region
recommendations.whyThisFits: These professional-grade scissors from a third-generation Spanish maker are the kind of elevated tool that someone passionate about cooking would truly appreciate. They're practical enough for daily use but sophisticated enough to match her dinner party hosting style.
recommendations.giftAngle: Present them as professional-grade tools that match her serious approach to cooking - something that will make her kitchen prep more efficient and enjoyable.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I see that you take cooking seriously, and you deserve tools that match your dedication and skill.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll reach for these scissors every time she prepares a meal, making her cooking process more efficient and professional.

recommendations.name: Spectrum Planner
recommendations.description: Beautifully designed undated planner with color-coded sections. Art-meets-function.
recommendations.whyThisFits: The Spectrum Planner bridges creativity and organization beautifully — color-coded sections and artistic design make planning feel like an extension of her creative practice rather than a chore.
recommendations.giftAngle: Frame it as a creative tool disguised as a planner — where art projects, inspiration, and daily life can all live together.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I know you're creative AND capable of amazing things — this helps you organize both your art and your life.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll use it daily for sketches, project planning, and capturing creative ideas

recommendations.name: Wingspan
recommendations.description: Award-winning engine-building board game about attracting birds. Gorgeous art, satisfying strategy. 1-5 players.
recommendations.whyThisFits: The gorgeous bird illustrations and strategic gameplay offer a different kind of creative engagement — she'll appreciate the stunning artwork while enjoying something social and surprising.
recommendations.giftAngle: Present it as beautiful art that also happens to be an amazing game — something to enjoy with friends or family.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'You have an eye for beauty and I found something that combines art with fun in an unexpected way.'
recommendations.usageSignal: Game night centerpiece for months — she'll admire the artwork even when not playing

recommendations.name: Motion 300 Portable Speaker
recommendations.description: Compact wireless speaker with spatial audio. Waterproof, 13hr battery. Great for outdoors.
recommendations.whyThisFits: A thoughtful practical pick for your niece that shows you put real thought into this.
recommendations.giftAngle: Give it with a note about why you picked this one specifically for them.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I want to encourage your passion for art and creativity.'
recommendations.usageSignal: Goes everywhere — kitchen, backyard, beach, camping trips
